variants: Caden Morales currently resides in Sproutwood Terrace, having been born in Driftleaf Warren. His remarkable contributions to the arts have been recognized with the Frostwillow Plaque. As an author, he created the Solaris Gold Compendium, which has gained significant popularity. Caden is also a dedicated member of the Juniper Maskmakers Collective, where he embraces his passion for mask-making. Through his various artistic pursuits, Caden continues to leave a lasting impression on his community.
